content:
# Apply Fixes

## Change Summary

No fixes required — the review stage approved the implementation with zero findings, zero gaps, and zero follow-up amendments. Verified all acceptance criteria still hold: cargo test (329 lib + 128 cli + 1 tmux + 667 unit = 1125 total, 0 failures), cargo clippy -- -D warnings clean, cargo fmt --check clean.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Verify cargo test still passes after review approval (no code changes needed)
2. [Completed] Verify cargo clippy -- -D warnings still clean
3. [Completed] Verify cargo fmt --check still clean
4. [Completed] Spot-check TokenCounts struct has cache_read_tokens and cache_creation_tokens fields
5. [Completed] Spot-check tracing::info! event in service.rs emits all required fields

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 329 lib + 128 cli + 1 tmux + 667 unit = 1125 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean, no warnings
- cargo fmt --check: clean, no formatting issues
- Review stage outcome: approved with empty findings_or_gaps and empty follow_up_or_amendments
- Spot-checked model.rs:240-247 confirms TokenCounts has cache_read_tokens and cache_creation_tokens
- Spot-checked service.rs:262-277 confirms tracing::info! with invocation_id, backend, model, attempt, duration_ms, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, tokens_reported, cache_reported, session_reused

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
